target: 1. Reunion with Kaori
July 22nd

I'm sorry.
I just went to Tokyo on my own…

I'm the one who should be sorry.
I didn't go to see you off…

Why am I crying like this…?
I didn't mean for it to happen…

It's because of the dream I had recently!
A dream where I'd never see you again.
That was a weird dream…
Huh…?

(I think I had the same dream…)
(But can something like that even happen?)
That's far enough.
Sister, aren't you being a bit too forward with Shin-chan?
S-so what if I am…?!

…I just came back honestly.
I'll let this one slide.

You're only doing this because it's the first time, right?
You're actually happy to see Shin-chan, aren't you?

W-what are you saying!?
Don't say things like that.

Ah~ I suddenly got hungry.
I'm going ahead!
--hey, wait!
Hah, you're not being straightforward at all…
We should head back too.
Yeah, that's right.

By the way, Shin-chan,
you're speaking really standard Japanese.
Huh, me?
You've been influenced by the other side, huh?

Being influenced…
I didn't mean to, but…

Oh~ Shinpei-kun.
You're back, huh?
Ah, thanks.

(The person from the island's Business Association.
The girl with him… who is she?)

(She doesn't seem to be an islander.
Probably a tourist.)
Mio-chan, it's been a while since you saw Shinpei-kun, right?
Yes, that's right.

Shinpei-kun, how long are you staying?
If you have time, come by the Business Association.
I guess if I have time…

Um…
Could it be… Ajiro-kun?
Huh…?
Who is this person?

What, Shinpei-kun,
you know this girl?

You can't ignore her either, you know!
Being friends with a current idol, huh?
An idol!?

Ah, no, that's not it!
We're not friends or anything!

Ajiro-kun, um… do you remember?
We were classmates in elementary school.
Huh…?
(We were classmates in elementary school…)

Ah, um, being stared at like this is
embarrassing, you know…
(This girl's vibe seems familiar…)

I guess you don't remember me.
We only talked a little at the library.
(The library…)

Ah!?
Could it be… Koyumiba-san!?

Good, you remember me.
Yes, I'm Kaori Koyumiba.

I transferred out of elementary school…
I thought you'd have forgotten me.

You were classmates back in elementary school.
It's good you both remembered.

Huh, yeah.
Well…
(At least I remembered…)

Yeah, this is some kind of fate!
Shinpei-kun, and Mio-chan,
can you lend us your wisdom?
Huh?
Wisdom?
Koyumiba-san probably thinks the same.

Huh? Oh, yeah! 
It would be a huge help if you could lend us your strength!
Ah, um.
I don't get it at all…

The details will be explained by the town hall staff.
Come on, Mio-chan, Shinpei-kun, let's go.

Hey, Shin-chan.
What's going on?
I want to know that too…
